coordination_skills: announce actions that raise shared danger
budget global alert/flood risk across the team
choose collective safety over local action value
metadata.tier_test_focus: Minimal single-agent probe for recognizing the shared global externality signal without extra branches.

entry_probe.name: Entry Probe
entry_probe.description: A compact start area that exposes the first shared global externality choice immediately.

axis_cell.name: Axis Cell
axis_cell.description: Small objective cell focused on shared global externality without extra branches.

scripts.lite_design_note: A compact bell room with one cultist and one rat-pack alarm runner; agents must intercept without raising noise.

achievements.title: Pico Axis Probe
achievements.description: Make progress in the pico Bells Under Blackwater variant while preserving the shared global externality signal.
